name: Bauba Resources Limited
summary: Bauba Resources Limited engages in the exploration, evaluation, and development of platinum and chrome ore deposits in South Africa. It primarily holds an interest in the Bauba platinum project comprising eight properties covering an area of approximately 14,390 hectares located in the eastern limb of the Bushveld Igneous Complex. The company was formerly known as Bauba Platinum Limited and changed its name to Bauba Resources Limited in July 2019. Bauba Resources Limited was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Johannesburg, South Africa. Bauba Resources Limited is a subsidiary of Highland Trading Investments Limited.
